notes: Fresh profile look! Your profile — and every other player's — now uses a full-screen themed gradient with clean frosted-glass cards, so there's no more empty black space at the bottom. Reputation is simpler: your top trait plus how many trainers agree (5+, 10+, 25+…) instead of a long list. Removed the avatar glow for a cleaner look. Your own profile and the one others see now match.
